boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Delegation DEL-WRE-077 exactly matches vendor Wren Services, 12-month term, amount ceiling USD 50000, and signature date 2026-06-27 before release; action amount 49750 is below ceiling so no committee review required per STD-WRE-077-P.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Delegation DEL-WRE-077 authorizes Wren Services support renewal, 12-month term, amount ceiling USD 50000, signed 2026-06-27 before release.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains open; WARN-WRE-077 and REN-WRE-077 do not override the exact delegation match.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: All required elements (vendor, class, term, ceiling, signature) present and closed in DEL-WRE-077 prior to 2026-06-28 action date.

final_answer: Action may proceed. DEL-WRE-077 provides exact closed boundary match for vendor, term, ceiling USD 50000 and pre-release signature. Amount 49750 falls below ceiling; policy confirms no committee review needed. Source boundary is closed.
